Comfortable Accommodations: Phakphing Erawan Homestay in Tha Kradan offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden or mountain views. Each room includes a dining table, refrigerator, TV, and free toiletries.
Dining and Leisure: Guests can enjoy a restaurant serving Thai cuisine in a traditional ambience, a bar, and a terrace. The homestay features a garden, outdoor seating area, and live music. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Local Attractions: Erawan Waterfall is 7 km away, The Nine-Army Battle Historical Park 22 km, and Malika R.E.124 The Siamese Living Heritage Town 43 km from the homestay. Other attractions include Saiyok Noi Waterfall (45 km) and Huay Mae Khamin Waterfall (48 km).

Elegant Accommodation: Hilltop Erawan Camp in Si Sawat offers a lodge experience with a terrace and free WiFi. Guests can relax in the outdoor seating area or enjoy the picnic area. Family rooms provide comfortable spaces for all travellers.
Comfortable Amenities: Each room features air-conditioning, a balcony with lake and mountain views, and a private bathroom. Additional amenities include a tea and coffee maker, dining table, refrigerator, and free toiletries. Free on-site private parking is available.
Local Attractions: Erawan Waterfall is 7 km away, The Nine-Army Battle Historical Park 31 km, and Huay Mae Khamin Waterfall 39 km from the property. Highly rated by guests, Hilltop Erawan Camp ensures a pleasant stay.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, balconies with lake or mountain views, and modern amenities such as free WiFi, flat-screen TVs, and work desks.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant offers American and Thai cuisines in a modern and romantic ambience. Guests can enjoy lunch and dinner in the dining area or outdoor seating.
Leisure Facilities: The hotel provides water sports facilities, a heated pool, terrace, and hot tub. Additional amenities include a waterpark, canoeing, and free on-site private parking.
Location and Attractions: Located in Ban Hin Hak, the hotel is 21 km from Erawan Waterfall and 41 km from The Nine-Army Battle Historical Park. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
